# mail-index

> A local, agent-queryable mail intelligence layer. It indexes a mailbox
> progressively (cheap metadata for everything, full bodies only where they earn
> their place), builds a correspondence graph, infers interest, and exposes the
> whole thing to AI agents through a local MCP server. Local-first (the index
> never leaves the machine), read-only on the mailbox by default (archive +
> label edits are opt-in), and built for *recall*
> (answering vague questions) rather than exact-query lookup.

mail-index is a stdio MCP server (`mail-index-mcp`) plus a CLI (`mail-index`).
Agents query a local SQLite + FTS5 index instead of hitting the mail provider:
that is ~20–30× fewer tokens than a stock Gmail-API MCP (which streams raw
message payloads into context) and answers questions a keyword query can't.
TypeScript, `node:sqlite` (no native deps), Node 24+. The tool ships none of any
user's data; accounts and the curated profile are private operator config.

## Start here
- [README](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/README.md): what it is, quick start, the Gmail-MCP comparison with charts
- [Install guide](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md): install, authenticate a MailSource, init/sync/curate/enrich, add the MCP server (incl. desktop-app PATH gotchas)
- [Agent setup](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/AGENTS.md): wiring the MCP into Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Codex / any MCP client, plus a usage primer for the agent

## Reference
- [MCP tool reference](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/docs/MCP.md): the 21 tools (19 read-only + the 2 opt-in writers archive_message/modify_labels), args, compact result shapes, the `index_as_of` freshness + command-handback contracts
- [Adapter contract](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/docs/ADAPTERS.md): the `MailSource` interface and how to write + contract-test a new provider adapter
- [Architecture & plan](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/docs/PLAN.md): data model, layered architecture, the ADR digest, roadmap
- [Decision records](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/tree/main/docs/adr): ADR-0001 (O(1) inline enrich / command handbacks), 0002 (local-only), 0003 (summaries + demotion), 0004 (intelligence is the user's LLM), 0005 (freshness/background sync), 0006 (self-contained FTS5), 0007 (opt-in mailbox writes)

## Why it's different
- [Comparison vs a stock Gmail MCP](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/docs/COMPARISON.md): lookup vs recall, the token-cost write-up
- [Benchmark harness](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/bench/README.md): reproduce the token + recall numbers (`node bench/run.mjs`, `node bench/accuracy.mjs`)
- [Benchmark results](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/bench/RESULTS.md): recall × token matrix — a distilled Gmail query vs one mail-index phrase

## Optional
- [Security & privacy](https://github.com/alunsoldantarctica/mail-index/blob/main/.github/SECURITY.md): local-first posture, treating the index as sensitive, vulnerability reporting
